title: astragalus viridiflavus
intro: Astragalus viridiflavus, also known as Chinese milk vetch or green-flowered astragalus, is a flowering plant in the legume family native to China and Mongolia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus viridiflavus include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. It is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
